testcase.name: AI Service - Auth Guard: Protected endpoint should reject unauthenticated request
testcase.classname: Protected endpoint should reject unauthenticated request

testcase.name: AI Service - Health: GET /api/ai/health should return service status UP
testcase.classname: GET /api/ai/health should return service status UP

testcase.name: AI Service - Ingest Context Validation: POST /api/ai/ingest-context with empty payload should return 400
testcase.classname: POST /api/ai/ingest-context with empty payload should return 400

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F35 ingestContext should reject empty payload
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F35 ingestContext should reject payload larger than 100 records
testcase.classname: @F35 ingestContext should reject payload larger than 100 records

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F35 ingestContext should reject missing studentId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F36 getResult should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F36 getResult with JWT should return result or not found
testcase.classname: @F36 getResult with JWT should return result or not found

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F36 getResult should validate invalid attemptId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F37 getDetailedResult should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F37 getDetailedResult with JWT should return detail or not found
testcase.classname: @F37 getDetailedResult with JWT should return detail or not found

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F37 getDetailedResult should validate invalid attemptId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F38 getStudentStatistics should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F38 getStudentStatistics should validate invalid studentId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F38 getStudentStatistics with admin JWT should not return unauthorized
testcase.classname: @F38 getStudentStatistics with admin JWT should not return unauthorized

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F39 getClassStatistics should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F39 getClassStatistics should validate invalid classId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F39 getClassStatistics with admin JWT should not return unauthorized
testcase.classname: @F39 getClassStatistics with admin JWT should not return unauthorized

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F40 getSystemStatistics should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F40 getSystemStatistics with admin JWT should return stats
testcase.classname: @F40 getSystemStatistics with admin JWT should return stats

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F41 getInsight should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F41 getInsight should validate invalid studentId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F41 getInsight with admin JWT should not return unauthorized
testcase.classname: @F41 getInsight with admin JWT should not return unauthorized

testcase.name: AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F42 getRecommendations should reject unauthenticated request
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F42 getRecommendations should validate invalid studentId
AI Service - Task 8 Functions: @F42 getRecommendations with admin JWT should not return unauthorized
testcase.classname: @F42 getRecommendations with admin JWT should not return unauthorized
